intro: Ophrys × explanata, also known as the Hoop Orchid or Hoop Orchid Hybrid, is a rare and unique hybrid orchid species within the Ophrys genus, characterized by its distinctive, hooded flowers. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Ophrys × explanata include alkaloids, such as orphine and orphinine, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to possess therapeutic effects, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
